title: Day 43 Lesson 1 ( Video )Asking to be introduced to a free Japanese class
html:
Day 43 Lesson 1 

ボランティアの　日本語教室 にほんごきょうしつを 紹介しょうかいしてもらう   = Asking to be introduced to a free Japanese class

場所 ばしょ = Location:  区役所くやくしょ = Ward office

登場人物  とうじょうじんぶつ = Characters:  リンさん　留学生  りゅがくせい= Lin-san study abroad student、区役所くやくしょの 職員 しょくいん = Ward office staff

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
